text:
(a) A person may appeal an order entered under Section 547.207 (Compliance Proceeding Issues) to a district court in Travis County only if a hearing was held by the department and the person:

(1) is aggrieved by the order; and

(2) appeared at the hearing on compliance.

(b) The department may bring suit in a district court of Travis County for an injunction to prohibit the manufacture, offer, distribution, or sale of an item of vehicle equipment that is the subject of a department order entered under Section 547.207 (Compliance Proceeding Issues) . The attorney general shall represent the department in the suit.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.208 — Judicial Review and Judicial Enforcement

(a) A person may appeal an order entered under Section 547.207 (Compliance Proceeding Issues) to a district court in Travis County only if a hearing was held by the department and the person:

    (1) is aggrieved by the order; and

    (2) appeared at the hearing on compliance.

(b) The department may bring suit in a district court of Travis County for an injunction to prohibit the manufacture, offer, distribution, or sale of an item of vehicle equipment that is the subject of a department order entered under Section 547.207 (Compliance Proceeding Issues) . The attorney general shall represent the department in the suit.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

is aggrieved by the order; and
appeared at the hearing on compliance.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may bring suit in a district court of Travis County for an injunction to prohibit the manufacture, offer, distribution, or sale of an item of vehicle equipment that is the subject of a department order entered under Section 547.207 (Compliance Proceeding Issues) . The attorney general shall represent the department in the suit.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
